content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

June 3, 2011

Robert F. Clark
City Manager
City of Ojai
P.O. Box 1570
Ojai, CA 93024

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-11-098

Dear Mr. Clark:

This letter confirms the receipt of your May 16, 2011, request for advice regarding Ojai City Treasurer Alan Rains. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329, unless you are an authorized representative of Mr. Rains, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B) and (c)(1).)
Therefore, your request is withdrawn. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Acting General Counsel

[illegible]
By: Emelyn Rodriguez
Commission Counsel

ER:jgl

Enclosure

sections.conclusion: The Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address the questions or provide analysis unless the requester is an authorized representative of Mr. Rains, therefore the request is withdrawn.
sections.question_synthetic: Can the FPPC provide advice regarding the City Treasurer's conduct based on a request from the City Manager?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide advice because the requester (City Manager) is not an authorized representative of the subject (City Treasurer), as required by Regulation 18329.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no traditional Q/C sections. Request was rejected on procedural/jurisdictional grounds. File number W-11-098 indicates withdrawal classification.

QUESTION: Can the FPPC provide advice regarding the City Treasurer's conduct based on a request from the City Manager?

CONCLUSION: The Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address the questions or provide analysis unless the requester is an authorized representative of Mr. Rains, therefore the request is withdrawn.

embedding.summary: The FPPC received a request for advice from the City Manager of Ojai regarding the City Treasurer but withdrew the request because the requester was not an authorized representative of the subject, as required by California Code of Regulations 18329.
